response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON claimed that the song 'Drawn to Dawn' had vocal lyrics starting from 00:32.001. However, audio analysis reveals that this video contains only the instrumental BGM and contains no spoken or sung vocals. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the lyrics provided in the reference JSON as there is no corresponding vocal audio in the video. 3. Timing & Pacing: Followed the Visual Events trigger exception to subtitle the prominent on-screen Japanese text notice for the entire duration of its visibility.
